raw_consumer_statement:
Macys will not send me my credit refund. I returned a few pairs of shoes, I already paid the full balance on my account. I had no intention on returning the shoes but they are the wrong size. 

On XXXX - I called and requested my credit refund of {$100.00}. I called again on XX/XX/year>, I was told my check was in the mail. 

On XX/XX/year>, I hade another credit balance on my account of {$160.00}. I was told at first that I would have to wait six months before receiving my credit refund balance. After calling continuously the representative said that the {$160.00} would be mailed to me as well. 

At this point the balance on my account is still a credit of {$160.00}. I have no idea what happened to my first credit check of {$100.00}. I keep getting the run around with the customer service credit department at Macys. I am very disappointed in the customer service I have received and they call me anthey call me a platinum member. At this point any assistance you could provide would be greatly appreciated. Thank you very much. 

XXXX XXXX
